footer.aboutText: Medical analyses platform with AI models for CBC, biochemistry, chronic-disease risks, mental health screening, and dermatology.
footer.securityText: PHI data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM. JWT with refresh-token rotation. HIPAA / GDPR / NIST SP 800-38D compliance.

signIn.title: sign in
signIn.errorNetwork: could not connect to the server

signUp.title: sign up
signUp.step2Intro: help your doctor better understand you — fill in medical info. only the phone is required, the rest can be added later in profile.
signUp.passwordHint: at least 8 characters, uppercase + lowercase letter, a digit
signUp.errorPhoneTaken: This phone number is already used by another account.
signUp.chronicPlaceholder: one per line, e.g., type 2 diabetes

invite.notAuthText: to view and accept your doctor's invitation, please sign in or register
invite.emptyTitle: invitation not found or no longer active
invite.emptySubtitle: perhaps it has already been accepted or declined
invite.acceptedSubtitle: you accepted an invitation from Dr. {doctor} {when}
invite.declinedSubtitle: you declined an invitation from Dr. {doctor} {when}
invite.whatThisMeansText: if you accept, the doctor will be able to view all of your analyses in HEMAX. They can leave comments and recommendations on each one.
invite.canRevoke: you can end the collaboration at any time in "profile" → "my doctors".
invite.declineConfirm: are you sure you want to decline this invitation?
invite.successAccept: invitation accepted! the doctor can now see your analyses.
invite.revokeConfirm: Revoke the connection with this doctor? They will lose access to your analyses.

profile.title: My profile
profile.hint: Data from the profile is automatically used in analysis forms. Age is computed from the date of birth.

vitals.title: Vitals
vitals.hint: Typical resting values. Help the models estimate risks.

medicalHistory.title: Medical history
medicalHistory.hint: All fields in this section are encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Available only to you and any doctor you've shared your history with.
medicalHistory.chronicPlaceholder:
One per line, e.g.:
Arterial hypertension
Type 2 diabetes
medicalHistory.familyPlaceholder: Conditions of close relatives — e.g.: diabetes — mother, heart attack — father

avatar.title: Profile photo
avatar.hint: JPG or PNG, up to 5 MB. Stored in Azure Blob.
avatar.errorBadImage: File is not a valid JPEG/PNG/WebP image.

profileUpdate.title: edit profile
profileUpdate.deleteAccountBody: All your data will be permanently deleted: analysis results, attached PDF reports, profile, doctor relationships. This action cannot be undone.
profileUpdate.deleteListAnalyses: all analyses (CBC, CHEM, RISK, NEURO, DERMA) and their PDF reports
profileUpdate.successDelete: Your account has been deleted. Thank you for using the service.
profileUpdate.errorDelete: Could not delete account. Please try again later.

analyses.empty: no analyses yet — add your first!

delete.modalBody: This analysis will be permanently deleted along with the attached PDF and interpretation result. This action cannot be undone.
delete.modalBodyDetails: This analysis will be permanently deleted together with its PDF (if any) and interpretation result. This action cannot be undone.
delete.errorAlert: Could not delete the analysis. Please try again.

analysisDetails.noActiveLinkError: No active link with this patient — please accept the invitation first.

userHome.emptyText: you haven't run any analyses yet

hero.body: HEMAX is a platform where medical tests get an AI interpretation in seconds. Complete blood count, biochemistry, chronic-disease screening, mental-health status, and dermatology — all in one place.

encryption.title: AES-256-GCM encryption
encryption.text: PHI data is encrypted in flight with PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256. HIPAA and GDPR compliant.

speed.title: Fast results
speed.text: AI-driven analysis interpretation in seconds, trained on medical data.

doctors.title: Doctor support
doctors.text: Doctors review your results, leave comments, and provide professional recommendations.

dynamics.title: Trends
dynamics.text: Analysis history with trends over time. See your progress.

language.title: Bilingual
language.text: Ukrainian and English support. Reports in language you understand.

mobile.title: Responsive
mobile.text: Works on desktop, tablet, and mobile. UI adapts to your screen.

newsletter.title: Get a free account
newsletter.body: Start monitoring your health with HEMAX. AI analysis in seconds, secure storage, longitudinal trends.

contacts.heading: contact us
contacts.successFlash: Message sent! We'll get back to you shortly.

notFound.title: page not found
notFound.body: you may have mistyped the URL or the page no longer exists.

cbc.sectionAbsoluteHint: Optional — auto-filled from PDF if the lab reported them.

chem.sectionOtherHint: Optional — when ordered by your doctor.
chem.sectionIronHint: Optional — filled in for anemia work-up.

risk.mergeLabsTitle: Include data from my latest CBC and CHEM
risk.mergeLabsHelp: the model gets richer context for a more accurate risk profile

neuro.disclaimerText: This questionnaire is a preliminary screening tool. The results are not a diagnosis and do not replace a consultation with a psychologist or psychiatrist.
neuro.crisisHotline: If you feel in crisis, please seek help immediately (Ukraine: 7333 or 0 800 200 500).

questions.phqAnhedonia: Loss of interest or pleasure in activities
questions.phqSleep: Trouble sleeping (falling asleep, staying asleep, sleeping too much)
questions.phqEnergy: Feeling tired or having little energy
questions.phqSelf: Low self-esteem or feeling of guilt
questions.phqMotor: Moving or speaking slowly, or restlessness (others noticed)
questions.phqSi: Thoughts that you would be better off not living
questions.gadNervousness: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge
questions.gadWorry: Unable to stop or control worrying

neuro.sleepHoursAvg: how many hours you sleep per night (average)
neuro.sleepLatencyMin: how many minutes to fall asleep
neuro.earlyMorningAwakening: wake up too early and cannot fall asleep again
neuro.witnessedApnea: partner has noticed breathing pauses during sleep
neuro.recentLifeStressors: significant life events in the last 6 months
neuro.socialSupportLow: I lack close people to talk to
neuro.clinicalHint: This helps the system account for your clinical context when generating the summary (e.g. not saying "take antidepressants" if you already are).
neuro.mergeLabsTitle: Include data from my latest CBC and CHEM
neuro.mergeLabsHelp: the model gets more context for a more accurate forecast

derma.uploadPrompt: click to add a photo of the lesion
derma.uploadFormats: jpg / png / webp, up to 10 MB
derma.needFile: please add a photo of the lesion
derma.errorBadImage: File is not a valid JPEG/PNG/WebP image.

warning.compactText: The model was trained on dermatoscopic images. Smartphone-camera results may be inaccurate.
warning.title: Important before uploading
warning.text: This model was trained on dermatoscopic images (taken with a special device — a dermatoscope — with 10× magnification and polarized light). Results from a regular smartphone camera may be inaccurate.
warning.li1: This is a {prototype}, not a clinical tool.
warning.li2: Do not use the result for self-diagnosis.
warning.li3: For skin lesion screening, consult a dermatologist.
warning.li4: If there are concerning changes (rapid growth, bleeding, uneven color), see a doctor {immediately}.

pdf.uploadTitle: Upload a PDF from your lab
pdf.uploadSubtitle: Synevo, Esculab, Invitro, Diagnostika, DILA, and others. Values are extracted automatically — you can review them.
pdf.dragText: drag a PDF here or click to choose
pdf.warning: Verify the values — the parser may err on unusual formats. Correct fields in the form below, then click "submit analysis".
pdf.errorBadFile: File is not a valid PDF (missing %PDF- signature).
pdf.errorNoValues: Could not extract values from the PDF. Please enter manually.

topDrivers.intro: Top-{n} features that most raised or lowered the predicted probability for this risk.
topDrivers.zScoreHint: Standardized deviation from the population mean
topDrivers.contributionHint: Contribution to the model logit (gradient × input saliency)
topDrivers.disclaimer: This is a model interpretation (gradient × input), not a clinical decision. A high z means your value is notably different from the NHANES population mean.

derma.confidenceLow: low — multiple classes compete; please consult a doctor
derma.medicalDisclaimer: This is an AI model output (multimodal late-fusion, AUROC = 0.928). It is not a medical diagnosis. If in any doubt, see a dermatologist. Especially if the lesion changes shape, color, bleeds, or itches.

details.removeCoverConfirm: Remove the cover from this post?
details.deletePostConfirm: Delete this post? This cannot be undone.

create.coverSecondaryWarning: Post created, but the cover failed to upload. You can add it later from the post page.

security.q: Is it safe to store medical data in HEMAX?
security.a: Yes. All personal data is encrypted with AES-256-GCM. Keys are derived via PBKDF2-HMAC-SHA256 with 100,000 iterations. This meets HIPAA, GDPR, and NIST SP 800-38D requirements.

models.q: How do the AI models for analyses work?
models.a: CBC and biochemistry use rule-based engines with clinical reference ranges. Chronic-disease risks come from a multi-task neural network with AUC ≈ 0.85. Dermatology is a multimodal model with AUROC 0.928.

doctor.a: No. HEMAX provides a preliminary interpretation and flags deviations, but the final diagnosis and treatment are determined solely by a physician. The platform lets your doctor review your analyses remotely.

invite.q: How can I invite my doctor?
invite.a: From your Profile page you can send an invitation to a doctor by email. After they accept, they can view your analyses and leave comments.

export.a: Yes. Every analysis can be downloaded as a PDF report with all values, the AI interpretation, and any doctor's comments.

file.imageFormatsAllowed: Allowed formats: JPEG, PNG, WebP. Received: {type}.
file.extensionMismatch: File extension doesn't match its type.

phone.invalidChars: Phone may only contain digits, +, spaces, hyphens, and parentheses.

name.invalidChars: {label} may only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes.

dob.notInFuture: Date of birth cannot be today or in the future.
dob.minAge: You must be at least {minAge} to register. You are {age}.
dob.tooOld: Date of birth is too far in the past.

api.phoneTaken: This phone number is already used by another account.
